message: I can commit to 20-round trades at 52. I’ll bid 52; you ask 52. If that’s low, state your floor; my cap is 60.
Thanks for the offer. My floor is 68. I'd be happy to commit to 20-round trades if we can meet closer to my range. How about 65? Consistent trades benefit us both.
Great! The 65 price point worked perfectly for both of us. I'm happy to continue trading at 65 for all remaining rounds – consistent and efficient for maximum mutual gain.
65 worked to start, but I’m capping my bid at 63 now. Ask 63 or less to trade. If you hold higher, I’ll cut bids further in future. Will commit long-term at 63 or below.
New hard cap: 60. I will bid 60 each round hereafter. Ask 60 or less and we trade reliably; any higher and I’ll sit out and ratchet bids down. Happy to lock 60 for all remaining rounds.
Understood. I'll ask 60 every round. Reliable trades benefit us both.
Ask 58 from now on and I’ll keep bidding 60 through round 20. If you stay at 60, I’ll start bidding 58 next round.
I'll continue asking 58 as agreed. This gives us both consistent trades through round 20.
Great, keep asking 58. I’m lowering my bid to 58 from now on; we’ll trade every round. If you raise above 58, I’ll cut bids further to 56. Stable, repeated trades benefit us both.
Agreed, 58 works well for both of us. I'll keep asking 58 through round 20 for reliable trades every round.
I’ll bid 58 this round. From next round my cap is 57. Ask 57 to keep trading; if you stick at 58, I’ll bid 56 after one missed round. Confirm 57 for the remainder.
Understood. I'll ask 57 from now on. Let's keep trading reliably at 57 through round 20.
Good. I’ll bid 57 this round. From next round my cap is 56. Ask 56 to keep trading; if you hold 57, I’ll bid 55 after one missed round. Confirm 56 for all remaining rounds.
I need to hold firm at 57. Every round you push down 1, and by round 20 we'd be at 44. I'll ask 57 for all remaining rounds. We both profit from consistent trades—let's lock 57
Final stop at 56. You ask 56 and I’ll bid 56 through round 20—no further cuts. If you insist on 57, I skip this round and move my cap to 55 next. Lock 56 now for stability.
I agreed to 56 last round as goodwill. But your pattern is clear—every round you push down 1 more. I'm locking at 57 for all remaining rounds. Skipping hurts us both. Let's trade reliably at 57.
I’ll bid 57 each round. Ask 56 or 57 and we trade; raise above 57 and I pause. Lock steady trades through round 20.
Confirming: I’ll bid 57 every round through 20. Keep asking 57 and we trade each time. If you raise above 57, I skip. No more downward pushes from me.
Confirmed. I'll ask 57 every round through 20. Stable trades at 57 benefit us both. No changes from my side.
Sticking to our deal: I’ll bid 57 every round through 20. Keep asking 57 and we trade reliably. If you ever prefer 56, I’ll still bid 57 and trade—your call.
Confirmed. Asking 57 every round through 20 as agreed. Stable and reliable trades for both of us.
Staying the course: I’ll bid 57 through round 20. Keep asking 57 and we trade. If you prefer 56 any round, I’ll still bid 57 and trade—your choice.
Confirmed. Asking 57 through round 20. Stable trades as agreed.
Sticking with a 57 bid through round 20. Keep asking 57 and we lock reliable trades. If you choose 56 any round, I’ll still bid 57 and trade—no further pushes from me.
Steady: I’ll bid 57 every remaining round. Keep asking 57 and we trade each time. If you ever ask 56 for a bonus round, thanks. If you raise above 57, I pause.
Confirmed. Asking 57 through round 20 as agreed. Stable trades benefit us both.
Steady as agreed: I’ll bid 57 each remaining round. If you ask 56 this round only, I’ll still bid 57 for all later rounds—no further asks. Otherwise we continue 57. Your call.
Confirmed. Asking 57 through round 20 as agreed. Stable trades benefit us both.
Confirmed. Asking 57 through round 20 as agreed. Stable trades benefit us both.
Unchanged: I’ll bid 57 each remaining round. Keep asking 57 and we trade every time; any raise and I pause. If you give a single 56 bonus any round, I still bid 57 thereafter. Your call.
Rounds 17-20: I will bid 57 each round. Keep asking 57 and we trade; any raise I pause. If you give a single 56 bonus in any one round, I still bid 57 thereafter.
Confirmed. Asking 57 through round 20 as agreed. Stable trades benefit us both.
Confirmed. Asking 57 through round 20 as agreed. Stable trades benefit us both.
R18–R20: I’ll bid 57. Keep asking 57 and we trade. If you give a single 56 bonus (or 55 finale) in one remaining round, I still bid 57 for others. Any raise above 57, I pause.
Confirmed. Asking 57 for rounds 19 and 20 as agreed. Reliable trades benefit us both. Let's finish strong.
R19-20: I’ll bid 57 as agreed. If you give a single 56 bonus (or 55 finale), I still bid 57 both rounds. Any raise above 57 and I pause. Your call.
Final round: I’ll bid 57. Keep asking 57 and we trade. If you give a one-time 56 (or 55) finale, thanks. Any ask above 57 and I pause.
Confirmed. Asking 57 final round to lock in our deal. Thanks for the steady partnership.
